name: degoog-toolkit
description: SearXNG integrations, plugins, and themes for degoog.
author: SoPat712

plugins.name: Sports Results - alpha
plugins.description: Shows live sports scores, schedules, and standings. Activates on natural queries like team names, 'premier league standings', or 'lakers vs warriors'.

plugins.name: Currency
plugins.description: Currency converter with live rates. Triggers on !cur / !currency / !convert and on bare natural queries like '100 usd to eur'.

plugins.name: TMDB
plugins.description: Shows rich info panels for movies, TV shows, and actors. Activates on explicit movie/TV/person queries and when film-site or database URLs appear in search results.

plugins.name: Weather
plugins.description: Current weather with interactive charts (temperature, precipitation, wind, humidity), a 7-day forecast and configurable units (imperial by default — Fahrenheit, mph, mmHg, inch). Supports !weather <city>, leading phrases like 'weather in rome', and trailing-keyword queries like 'rome weather' or 'london forecast today'.

plugins.name: Speedtest
plugins.description: Internet speed test with selectable servers, latency, and a circular gauge. Supports !speedtest (aliases !speed, !speed-test, !networkspeed, !internetspeed) plus natural phrases like 'speed test', 'run a speedtest', or 'how fast is internet'. Note: if degoog's core built-in Speed Test command is enabled, disable it to route !speedtest here.

plugins.name: Coinflip
plugins.description: Realistic grey CSS coin flip for quick heads-or-tails decisions.

plugins.name: Timer / Stopwatch
plugins.description: Compact timer and stopwatch with smooth circular progress, editable durations, optional sound, and natural timer queries.

plugins.name: Reddit
plugins.description: Shows the top Reddit post and top comments above search results.

plugins.name: Dictionary
plugins.description: Shows definitions, pronunciation, synonyms, antonyms, and origin for explicit dictionary queries.

plugins.name: Calculator
plugins.description: Scientific calculator with safe expression parsing, interactive keypad, and local canvas graphing for x expressions.

plugins.name: Stocks
plugins.description: No-key stock quotes with server-side Yahoo Finance data, Stooq fallback, and selectable chart ranges.

plugins.name: Translate
plugins.description: No-key server-side translation command with provider switching and natural language slot triggers.

plugins.name: Search History
plugins.description: Stores your past searches with timestamps and surfaces them as a dropdown on the search bar. Use !history (or natural phrases like 'search history') to view a paginated, deletable list. Entries are kept locally in data/history.json and the maximum count is configurable.

plugins.name: Unit Converter
plugins.description: Unit converter for length, mass, volume, temperature, area, and speed. Supports fuzzy natural queries like '25.4oz toml' or '!unit 100c f'.

plugins.name: Until
plugins.description: Countdown answers for natural date queries like 'years until 3000', 'days since Christmas', 'hours until next Friday', or '!until 5pm'.

plugins.name: OpenStreetMap
plugins.description: Interactive OpenStreetMap card for map and location queries.

engines.name: SearXNG
engines.description: Search through your SearXNG instance via the JSON API.

engines.name: SearXNG Images
engines.description: Image search through your SearXNG instance via the JSON API.

engines.name: SearXNG Videos
engines.description: Video search through your SearXNG instance via the JSON API.

engines.name: SearXNG News
engines.description: News search through your SearXNG instance via the JSON API.

engines.name: SearXNG File
engines.description: File search through your SearXNG instance via the JSON API.

themes.name: LiterallyGoogle
themes.description: A Google-like theme with a sticky header and full-width above-results plugin slots.
